Sankesh Surana×Spacebar

A plan to build the perception and demand around your work — and The Designer's Trail.

Read on
01

What this is

We've had two good conversations. This is everything we discussed, written down plainly — what we'll do, why, how, and what it costs. Just the plan.

One thing worth saying upfront: your work already operates at a premium level. The craft, the depth, the story — it's all there. The opportunity isn't to change the work. It's to make your public presence finally match it.

02

Why we're doing this

Two outcomes sit at the centre of everything below.

I

Make you a leading voice in Indian jewellery design

Not a label. Not a stylist. A designer people can name — the example aspiring designers point to when they want to understand what real jewellery design actually looks like. That gap in the market is wide open, and your experience is exactly what fills it.

II

Build real demand for The Designer's Trail

The Designer's Trail works because you lead it. People won't want it as a course — they'll want it because it's a way to learn the way you see. So your personal brand becomes the engine that powers everything around it.

03

How it actually works

Before the funnel, the simple version. People discover you. We earn their interest with content that builds authority, trust and familiarity. By the time they reach out — to buy, or to learn — they already believe in you.

We're not chasing views. We're engineering that journey, so the people who come to you are the right ones, and they arrive ready.

Top of funnel · goes wide

Sankesh Surana

The personal brand. Attracts buyers, collectors, students and collaborators — and positions you as the artist and the authority.

Then it splits into two paths
If they're a buyer

Studio & Atelier

The pieces, the craft, the private consultation.

A consultation, or a studio visit
If they're a designer

The Designer's Trail

Value-led content, community, and the way you see.

The website → the course or the retreat

The Studio & Atelier account is run by another team. We've mapped it here so the whole journey is clear — but it sits outside this scope.

04

How we build it

There are four projects in the bigger picture: your personal brand, The Designer's Trail brand, the website, and the course. This engagement covers the first three — the course is a longer, separate build we'll scope when the time is right. Think of it as a 90-day plan with room to breathe — 90 to 120 days — since the website depends on how deep your vision goes.

Month 1

Foundations

Launch both brands. Lock positioning, content pillars, tone and a capture system. Start the flywheel — and start learning your taste, process and story from the inside.

Month 2

Momentum

The flywheel is running; we tune the strategy off what's working. We also begin the website — brief, structure, wireframes.

Month 3

Compounding

The first real compounding shows up. The website goes live, and the attention you've built starts converting — early signups, a waitlist, a community ready to act.

05

What it costs

₹2,50,000 / month Excl. GST
Sankesh Surana — personal brand ₹1,50,000 / mo 15–20+ pieces a month — and we'll push above the range when a moment calls for it. It's a guide, not a quota: some months mean fewer short videos and a couple of long-form pieces or a YouTube film instead. We move with the outcome, not a counter.
The Designer's Trail — social brand ₹1,00,000 / mo 10–12+ pieces a month that go deep. Depth over volume — fewer posts, each one carrying real weight, built to teach and to build community.
Both include the full strategy, the creative direction, and a redistribution engine — your content re-cut and re-optimised for LinkedIn, Facebook and beyond. All in.
The website and the course are billed separately. We'll scope each one properly and quote it before any work begins — no guesswork, no surprise numbers.

You're not paying for posts. You're paying for everything behind them.

Content is only the vehicle — the way the work reaches the world. The real impact comes from how we position you, who we put it in front of, and how it's packaged. A fine jewel is never sold by a photograph of it; the photograph only carries the story outward. We build the story — the content simply delivers it.

Where we'd start

Both engines together — your personal brand and The Designer's Trail — at ₹2,50,000/month. The website and course follow as we move into Month 2 and 3 and the scope gets clear.
